UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ksenia Tsenin; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Manjula Patel is present and in Pro Per.
Defendants Shahyar Mansour and Shayan Salmassi are present.
Attorney Peter Chess representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of NOV-19-2012 is vacated.
